questions.question: Task X must finish before Task Y. Task Y cannot start on Tue. Earliest day for Y if X takes 2 days starting Thu?
questions.solution: Step 1: X runs 2 days from Thu. Step 2: Y starts after X, not on Tue. Answer: Fri.
